purpose: Conservative multi-stage reverse parking plan for the current YOLO + STM32 small car stack.

calibration_primitives.name: left_arc_probe
calibration_primitives.success: abs(corridor_x_err_px) decreases or abs(lat_cm) decreases, and corridor_min_margin_px does not drop by more than 2 px

calibration_primitives.name: right_arc_probe
calibration_primitives.success: abs(corridor_x_err_px) decreases or abs(lat_cm) decreases, and corridor_min_margin_px does not drop by more than 2 px

calibration_primitives.name: straight_probe
calibration_primitives.success: lon_cm decreases while lateral and line-margin metrics remain bounded

stages.name: S0_acquire_and_validate
stages.entry: YOLO slot polygon stable for 3 frames and STM32 STAT/PWM_STAT are readable

stages.name: S1_entry_arc
stages.entry: response calibration identifies which steering side increases line clearance and reduces approach error
stages.output: one calibrated reverse arc step at 6-12 cm, later 20 cm only after repeated improvement

stages.name: S2_counter_arc
stages.entry: slot grows near, heading error or side-line margin indicates the car must straighten before losing YOLO
stages.output: opposite steering arc with shorter distance than S1

stages.name: S3_straight_finish
stages.entry: car is inside corridor, heading is near slot axis, and side margins are not shrinking
stages.output: short straight reverse steps; YOLO loss is tolerated for at most 0.5 s

stages.name: S4_stop
stages.entry: vision lost too long, line margin too small, divergence detected, cap reached, or final pose reached

do_not_use_yet: RL-style positive/negative feedback as the only controller
